For Traders 20% OFF Deal

For Traders is offering a 20% discount across all their forex challenge accounts using code NEW20. This promotion gives new and returning traders a meaningful cost reduction on entry into one of the UAE's most innovative prop trading environments. For Traders is built around a unique Lockout Mode feature that helps traders protect their mental capital and prevent emotional decision-making during volatile sessions.

For Traders is a Dubai-based proprietary trading firm that has distinguished itself through a combination of technological innovation and trader welfare features. The firm's UAE base connects them to the heart of the Middle Eastern financial ecosystem, and their multi-platform support ensures traders can access their accounts on their preferred technology stack. For Traders has grown rapidly by focusing on features that solve real problems traders face during funded evaluations.

With code NEW20, you save 20% on the challenge fee across all available account sizes. The Lockout Mode is a standout feature included with all accounts — when activated, it prevents you from placing further trades after reaching a defined daily loss threshold, effectively acting as an automated circuit breaker that protects both your account and your mindset. This is a meaningful differentiator from firms that leave emotional risk management entirely to the trader.

For Traders supports multiple trading platforms, providing flexibility for traders who prefer different interfaces or algorithmic tools. Their challenge structure follows industry-standard profit targets and drawdown limits, with no artificial time pressure. The UAE regulatory environment provides a stable operational framework for funded traders seeking reliable payouts.

To claim this deal, use the affiliate link above to visit For Traders, select your preferred account size, and enter NEW20 at checkout. The 20% discount will be applied to your order immediately. Explore the Lockout Mode settings on the For Traders dashboard to understand how to configure it for your trading style once funded.
